data.title: Red Pine starts surface trenching at Wawa Gold Project to define gold mineralization geometry in open pit areas.
data.description: Red Pine Exploration Inc. has started a surface trenching, geologic mapping, and sampling initiative at the Wawa Gold Project in Canada. The program, launched by the company (TSXV: RPX, OTCQB: RDEXF), is designed to enhance understanding of gold mineralization geometry in zones with open pit potential. The endeavor, as indicated in a prior Press Release from May 8, 2025, is part of Red Pine's ongoing efforts to advance its operations. Michael Michaud, the President and CEO of Red Pine, expressed enthusiasm for the project, highlighting the importance of surface trenching.

data.title: Exodus Movement's treasury grew to 2,123 BTC in September 2025 as operations continued to generate Bitcoin.
data.description: Bitcoin mining operations are ongoing, resulting in the accumulation of 2,123 BTC in the treasury.

data.title: Strong Taiwan Semi sales boosted by Nvidia CEO; Delta Air earnings beat. Dow Jones Futures affected positively.
data.description: Following a surge in the S&P 500 led by Nvidia CEO Huang, Taiwan Semiconductor reported robust sales, while Delta Air witnessed a rise in earnings. This positive momentum resulted in an increase in the Dow Jones Futures market. Taiwan Semiconductor, a key chipmaker for Nvidia, recorded strong sales figures. Similarly, Delta Air exceeded earnings expectations. The overall market response was reflected in the performance of the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Futures.

data.title: EXCEL expands with new Creola, AL office, bolstering services for Eastern Gulf Coast and Eastern U.S. regions, 15 miles north of Mobile.
data.description: In a recent announcement on October 9, 2025, EXCEL, a renowned provider of industrial construction and maintenance services, unveiled the establishment of its latest office in Creola, Alabama, positioned about 15 miles to the north of Mobile. This move is designed to bolster EXCEL's capacity in catering to its clients and boosting its presence in the region.

data.title: Draganfly partners with Defense Prime Global Ordnance for strategic defense collaboration.
data.description: Law enforcement officials reported that a total of 250 individuals were arrested in a recent operation targeting organized crime in the city. The operation involved 500 law enforcement officers who conducted raids on various locations linked to criminal organizations. During the raids, authorities seized a total of 50 firearms, 10 kilograms of illegal drugs, and an undisclosed amount of cash. The arrested individuals are facing charges related to drug trafficking, illegal possession of firearms, and participation in organized crime. The officials stated that this operation was a significant blow to the criminal activities in the city and emphasized their commitment to combating organized crime.

data.title: Chevron to start drilling Korikori-1 well offshore Suriname in Block 5 spanning 2,200 sq km, water depths 30-60m.
data.description: Chevron Suriname Exploration Limited, a subsidiary of Chevron Corporation (NYSE: CVX), recently announced plans to commence drilling the Korikori-1 exploration well in Block 5 this month. The company holds a 40% interest in Block 5, located approximately 78 kilometers off the coast of Suriname in the north-central region. Covering an area of about 2,200 square kilometers, Block 5 is situated in the western shallow offshore area of the Suriname-Guyana Basin, with distances varying from 45 to 82 kilometers from the Nickerie coast. Water depths in this region range from 30 to 60 meters. For more information, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: InMode expects Q3 revenue between $92.5M-$93.0M, FY 2025 guidance $365M-$375M. Conference call on Nov 5 at 8:30 am.
data.description: InMode Ltd., a prominent provider of cutting-edge medical technologies, is scheduled to host a conference call on Wednesday, November 5, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The company, based in YOKNEAM, Israel, publicized that it anticipates unveiling its financial results for the upcoming quarter. InMode Ltd. is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol INMD.

data.title: MSC Income Fund reported Q3 2025 private loan activity, including new or increased commitments in its portfolio.
data.description: In Houston on October 9, 2025, MSC Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE: MSIF) has disclosed notable developments in its private loan portfolio. In the recent quarter of 2025, MSC Income initiated new loans or expanded existing commitments within its private portfolio. The fund, known as "MSC Income," is providing increased support to various sectors through these activities.

data.title: Morgan Stanley's Lisa Shalett warns of AI investment bubble, likening Nvidia to Cisco; fears potential market crash.
data.description: Lisa Shalett, the Chief Investment Officer at Morgan Stanley's wealth management division, has raised concerns about the current market surge, driven mainly by significant investments in generative artificial intelligence (AI). She warned that this heavy dependence on AI capital expenditures poses a potential risk to market stability, stating that a market downturn akin to the dotcom bubble burst in 2000 could occur if the AI narrative weakens. Shalett expressed that the market might not see a repeat of the "Cisco moment," referencing the 80% stock drop of the networking giant following the dotcom bubble burst, in the next nine months. However, she cautioned that a similar situation could still emerge.

data.title: DPC Dash, Domino's Pizza China, sees growth in Q3 2025 with store expansion, innovation, digital leadership.
data.description: On October 9, 2025, in Hong Kong, DPC Dash, which is Domino's Pizza China's exclusive master franchisee in the Chinese Mainland, Hong Kong Special Administrative Region, and Macau Special Administrative Region, announced. The company is traded as 1405.HK on the stock exchange.
